experience.title: Our Experience
experience.intro: At Cloud UI, we help companies and SMEs design, develop, modernize, and operate technological solutions that optimize processes, improve business control, and enable secure scaling.
experience.proof: Our experience is supported by implementations of CRMs, ERPs, web platforms, mobile applications, report automation, cloud solutions, and transactional systems, delivered for sectors such as banking, insurance, logistics, commerce, government, and services.

sections.title: Enterprise Platforms (CRM & ERP)
sections.description: We design and implement tailor-made enterprise systems aligned with the real operation of your business.
items: Implementation and maintenance of CRM systems for purchasing, inventory, and operational management in financial and commercial companies.
Development of banking CRMs for credit application management.
Development of banking CRMs for card activation and management.
Development of banking CRMs for transaction control and security validations (PCI).
Implementation of HR CRMs for employee control, vacations, permissions, and internal processes.
Development of ERPs and logistics systems for port manifest management.
Development of ERPs and logistics systems for integration with government entities.
Development of ERPs and logistics systems for customs and commercial information processing.
These solutions have been implemented for organizations in the banking, insurance, government, and private sectors.

sections.title: Process and Reporting Automation
sections.description: We optimize your company’s daily operation through automation and data analysis.
items: Automation of financial, operational, and regulatory reports.
Data extraction from BPM systems and enterprise platforms.
Generation of statistics for credit settlement.
Generation of statistics for internal control procedures.
Generation of statistics for certifications and institutional reports.
Reduction of manual tasks and improved response times.

sections.title: Cloud, Infrastructure, and Scalability
sections.description: We implement technological solutions designed to grow with you, using modern and secure infrastructure.
items: Migration of systems to cloud infrastructure (Azure and AWS).
Development and deployment of applications in cloud environments.
Architectures based on microservices, containers, and Kubernetes.
API integration and service modernization (SOAP to REST).
Platforms with high availability, scalability, and operational control.

sections.title: Mobile Applications and Operational Solutions
sections.description: We develop mobile applications and platforms connected to enterprise systems.
items: Mobile apps with geolocation for field operations control.
Application integration with administrative dashboards.
Digital processing of evidence, forms, and reports.
Publishing, maintenance, and evolution of production applications.

sections.title: Integrations, DevOps, and Continuous Operations
sections.description: We ensure solutions work correctly in production.
items: Integration of enterprise systems and external platforms.
Implementation of deployment pipelines and CI/CD automation.
Quality control, code analysis, and deployment security.
Post-implementation support and continuous improvement.

sections.title: Technology Support and Business Operations
sections.description: We support your company with structured and reliable assistance.
items: Incident management and resolution under SLA.
Level 1 and Level 2 technical support for platforms and systems.
B2B support and remote assistance.
Process, incident, and solution documentation.
Continuous optimization based on service metrics.

sections.title: Security and Best Practices
sections.description: We protect your company’s critical information and processes.
items: Implementation of cybersecurity best practices.
Security validations in financial and transactional systems.
Reduction of technological and operational risks.
Security applied to platforms, integrations, and data.

sections.title: Digital Transformation and Ongoing Guidance
sections.description: At Cloud UI, we do more than implement technology: we accompany you throughout the full process.
items: Technology advisory focused on SMEs and growing companies.
Clear communication, without unnecessary technical jargon.
Solutions aligned with productivity, efficiency, and scalability.
Continuous support before, during, and after each implementation.

experience.closing_text: Cloud UI is your technology partner for turning complex processes into clear, secure, and scalable digital solutions adapted to your company’s reality.

support.title: Technical Support and Business Operations
support.description_outro: to users and businesses under structured service models, ensuring operational continuity and efficient response times.
items: Ticket management and resolution under SLA
Level 1 and Level 2 technical support (hardware, software, and networking)
B2B support and remote assistance
Incident and solution documentation
Continuous improvement based on service metrics

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure, Cloud and Systems
infrastructure.description_highlight: implementation, administration, and optimization of technological infrastructure
items: Management of Windows environments and Active Directory
User, access, and device management
Support for collaborative tools (Office 365, Google Workspace)
Virtualization, remote desktops, and hybrid environments
Support in cloud migration processes

home.main_subtitle: At Cloud UI, we bring your ideas to life. We create, design, and automate custom digital platforms. We respect your intellectual property and build intelligent structures that drive your business growth.
home.main_cta: I Want to Start My Project Today
home.argument_text: We focus on the engineering. Cloud UI does not keep your intellectual property. You are the owner of the idea, the business, and the code. We are the hammer you need to build the structure.
home.what_we_do_title: What We Do (For SMEs, Clear and Concrete)
home.who_we_work_for_text: We help SMEs, entrepreneurs, and established businesses to digitize and grow.
home.how_we_do_it_text: Your project needs more than a pretty design, it needs an intelligent structure.
home.focus_item1_text: You have the idea, but you lack the structure. We give technical form to your concept to make it viable and scalable.
home.focus_item2_text: We get your app or platform ready to work from day one. Forget about complexity and start selling or operating.
home.focus_item3_text: We integrate automatic processes so that your business does more with less. Save time and staff by making technology work for you.
home.final_cta_title: Don't let your idea stay on napkins. Are you ready to see it working?
home.final_cta_button: Let's Talk About Your Next Big Project
home.mission_text: We provide affordable technology solutions to small and medium-sized businesses, startups, and entrepreneurs through web design and white-label software, adapting to their operational processes. We do this remotely, quickly, and efficiently, helping them improve their logistics, inventory, accounting, and more.
home.vision_text: To be the preferred technology partner for SMEs and entrepreneurs in Latin America, recognized for offering functional, affordable, and easy-to-implement digital tools that transform the way they manage their businesses.

items.title: Software Development and Digital Solutions
items.text:
We have experience supporting software development and digital solutions projects aligned with business goals.

• Backend development and application support
• Database management and version control
• Support for development and deployment workflows
• Requirements validation and post-delivery support

items.title: Cloud Migration
items.text: Retail and e-commerce scalability: Migration of a major retailer's on-premise servers to a scalable cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP) to handle massive traffic spikes.

items.title: Process Automation and Improvement
items.text: We help companies organize, document, and automate their technology processes, reducing errors and increasing efficiency. • Creation of knowledge bases (Knowledge Base) • Documentation of technical and operational processes • Standardization of support, onboarding, and offboarding flows • Optimization of internal and operational processes

items.title: Custom Websites
items.text: B2B Commodities Marketplace: Development of a secure portal that connects agricultural producers (e.g., coffee growers, fruit exporters) directly with international buyers, with tools for contract management, quality control, and logistics tracking.

items.title: Digital Transformation and Guidance
items.text:
Beyond technology, we support companies in their digital adoption process, communicating solutions clearly and with a results-oriented approach.

• Technology advisory for SMEs
• Communication between technical and non-technical teams
• Focus on productivity, scalability, and efficiency
• Continuous support before and after implementation

items.title: Cybersecurity and Best Practices
items.text:
We implement practical cybersecurity measures focused on protecting operations and raising user awareness.

• Risk and vulnerability identification
• Cybersecurity training and awareness
• Best practices based on recognized standards
• Reduction of operational and technological risks

items.title: Data Analytics
items.text: Cloud and on-premise database administration. Experience with top market managers. Relational databases: Oracle, SQL Server, MySql, Postgres. NoSQL databases: MongoDB, Amazon DynamoDB, Redis. Data integration and automation: Implementations with SQL Server Integration Services, IBM InfoSphere DataStage, AWS Glue. Data analysis, mining, and visualization: Implementation of custom metrics and dashboards with Tableau, Metabase, and Power BI.

services_items.title: Web design (with store, reservations or blog)

sections.title: TRUST CENTER
sections.subtitle: Trust Center – Cloud UI
description: At Cloud UI we believe that technology should be built on three pillars: security, transparency, and customer ownership.

This Trust Center explains how we protect information, how we work, and what our legal and ethical commitments are in accordance with Law 81 of 2019 on Personal Data Protection of the Republic of Panama and other applicable regulations.
PRIVACY CHOICES
list: Request access to your personal data.
Object to the use of your data for commercial purposes.
To exercise your rights you may write to: info@cloudui.lat

sections.title: PRIVACY POLICY
sections.subtitle: Last updated: 2026
description: Data Controller: Cloud UI, Panama City, Panama. Email: info@cloudui.lat
Data We Collect:
Purpose of Processing: respond to inquiries and quotations, manage commercial proposals, execute contracts, coordinate meetings, improve user experience, and comply with legal obligations.
Legal Basis: data subject consent, contractual execution, compliance with legal obligations.
Retention: data will only be retained for the time necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected or as required by applicable legislation.

Transfers: we may use hosting providers, analytics tools, or technological services necessary for the operation of the website or the execution of projects. In the event of international data transfers, reasonable protection measures will be adopted in accordance with applicable regulations.
Cloud UI does not sell or rent personal data.

CODE OF CONDUCT

list: Not claim rights over ideas shared by the client.

sections.title: SECURITY POLICY
description: We apply reasonable security measures such as:
Although we implement protection measures, no system is completely immune to external risks.

sections.title: QUALITY POLICY
description: All projects follow a structured process that includes:
Our objective is to deliver functional, stable solutions aligned with the agreed scope.

sections.title: WARRANTY POLICY
description: Standard projects: 1 month warranty.
Complex projects: up to 3 months.
Includes correction of errors attributable to the initial development.
Does not include:
Subsequent maintenance is offered through a time-bank model or independent contract.

sections.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
description: Answers to the most common questions about working with Cloud UI.
list: Does Cloud UI keep my idea? No. Intellectual property belongs to the client, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
Can you sign an NDA? Yes, before sharing sensitive information.
Will the domain be registered under the client's name? Yes, unless something different is agreed in writing.
Do you offer support after the project? Yes, under an SLA model or hourly package.
Do you sell my personal data? No.
Can I request deletion of my data? Yes, by writing to info@cloudui.lat.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content:
This site uses cookies to improve the experience and obtain usage data. Cookies are small files that are stored on your device.

Types of cookies
- Essential: necessary for the operation of the site.
- Analytics: to measure visits and behavior (e.g. Google Analytics).
- Functional/Preferences: to remember language or settings.

You can accept or reject cookies through the cookie notice. You can also manage cookies from your browser (see your browser's documentation for instructions).
